insights: Moderately healthy tea-time biscuit. High in carbs, low in fat compared to cream cookies, but contains refined flour.
avoidReason: Refined flour and processed sugars. Restrict portion.

insights: Excellent source of high-quality protein and calcium. Probiotics aid digestive fitness.
Highly processed noodles. High in saturated fats and sodium, very low in essential fibers or proteins.
avoidReason: High sodium and trans fats. Palm oil processing.

insights: Extremely high calorie-density due to deep frying in vegetable oils. High sodium content.
avoidReason: Extremely high saturated fats and deep frying oils.

insights: Fantastic vegetarian protein source. Rich in healthy fats and low in carbs, perfect for muscle recovery.
Excellent low-calorie dairy alternative. Enriched with vitamin E, though low in protein.
Baked version is a healthier alternative to the traditional deep-fried snack, but sodium is still moderate.
High fiber and whole-grain energy. Good source of slow-release carbs, but check serving size for honey content.
avoidReason: High carb load if consumed in large portions.

insights: Superior workout recovery shake. Zero added sugar, packed with standard whey isolate protein.
